description_long: This advertising board is a freestanding, vertically-oriented structure with a rust-colored, weathered metal finish. The front face prominently displays the text 'DER LUTHER RÖDENTAL' in bold white letters, accompanied by a stylized bull head logo at the top and a red 'F' emblem below, with additional text in black and red. The board has an asymmetrical, slightly tapered shape, with the lower section angled and a rectangular base for stability. The sides are narrow and flat, revealing the board's thin profile and metallic construction. The surface appears robust and industrial, suitable for outdoor urban environments, and the graphics are static, likely printed or painted directly onto the metal.
description: A freestanding, rust-colored metal advertising board with bold white and red graphics, featuring a bull logo and text. The board has an asymmetrical, tapered shape and a sturdy rectangular base.
description_view_0: The front view shows the full advertising content, including the bull logo, 'DER LUTHER RÖDENTAL' text, and the red 'F' emblem with additional writing.
description_view_1: The side view reveals the board's thin, flat profile and the angled lower section, with minimal visible graphics.
description_view_2: The rear view displays a similar rust-colored surface with the same graphics as the front, but the base and lower section details are more visible.
description_view_3: The opposite side view again highlights the board's slim profile and the protruding emblem, with no visible graphics.
attribute_frame_design: thick, solid metal frame with angular, asymmetrical edges
attribute_advertisement_content: static printed advertisement for 'DER LUTHER RÖDENTAL' with bull logo and red 'F' emblem
